breaking.title_zh: OpenAI发布GPT-5预览版，多模态能力大幅提升
breaking.title_en: OpenAI Releases GPT-5 Preview with Significant Multimodal Improvements
breaking.summary_zh: OpenAI正式发布GPT-5预览版本，新模型在图像理解、视频分析和语音交互方面实现突破性进展。API延迟降低40%，价格维持不变。
breaking.summary_en: OpenAI officially releases GPT-5 preview. The new model achieves breakthrough progress in image understanding, video analysis and voice interaction. API latency reduced by 40% while pricing remains unchanged.

breaking.title_zh: Anthropic完成新一轮融资，估值突破900亿美元
breaking.title_en: Anthropic Closes New Funding Round at $90B+ Valuation
breaking.summary_zh: Anthropic宣布完成由谷歌领投的新一轮融资，公司估值超过900亿美元。Claude 4 Enterprise版本同步上线，支持200万字上下文窗口。
breaking.summary_en: Anthropic announces new funding round led by Google, with company valuation exceeding $90B. Claude 4 Enterprise launches simultaneously, supporting 2M token context window.

breaking.summary_zh: 配置 API Key 后获取真实新闻

daily.title_zh: 微软Copilot新增'深度研究'模式，可自主完成复杂调研
daily.title_en: Microsoft Copilot Adds 'Deep Research' Mode for Autonomous Complex Research
daily.excerpt_zh: 微软宣布Copilot新增深度研究功能，AI可自主规划研究路径、搜索多源信息并生成综合报告。首批面向Microsoft 365 Enterprise用户开放。
daily.excerpt_en: Microsoft announces Copilot deep research feature where AI can autonomously plan research paths, search multiple sources and generate comprehensive reports. First available to Microsoft 365 Enterprise users.

daily.title_zh: 欧盟AI法案实施细则正式生效，高风险AI系统面临合规大考
daily.title_en: EU AI Act Implementation Rules Take Effect, High-Risk AI Systems Face Compliance Test
daily.excerpt_zh: 欧盟AI法案实施细则今日正式生效，涵盖医疗、教育、招聘等8个高风险领域的企业必须在6个月内完成合规整改。违规最高可处全球营收7%罚款。
daily.excerpt_en: EU AI Act implementation rules take effect today. Enterprises in 8 high-risk areas including healthcare, education and recruitment must complete compliance rectification within 6 months. Maximum fine: 7% of global revenue.

daily.title_zh: Stability AI开源新一代视频生成模型Stable Video 3D
daily.title_en: Stability AI Open Sources Next-Gen Video Model Stable Video 3D
daily.excerpt_zh: Stability AI发布并开源Stable Video 3D模型，支持从单张图片生成360度可交互3D视频。模型参数量较前代减少50%，生成速度提升3倍。
daily.excerpt_en: Stability AI releases and open sources Stable Video 3D model, supporting 360-degree interactive 3D video generation from a single image. Model parameters reduced by 50% with 3x faster generation speed.

daily.title_zh: 字节跳动Seed团队发布音乐生成大模型，支持中英文歌词
daily.title_en: ByteDance Seed Team Releases Music Generation Model Supporting Chinese and English Lyrics
daily.excerpt_zh: 字节跳动Seed团队发布开源音乐生成大模型Seed-Music，支持通过文本提示生成完整歌曲，可处理中英文歌词，最长支持4分钟音频。
daily.excerpt_en: ByteDance Seed team releases open-source music generation model Seed-Music, supporting full song generation from text prompts with Chinese and English lyrics, up to 4 minutes of audio.

daily.title_zh: 英伟达H100供应量持续紧张，交货周期延长至52周
daily.title_en: Nvidia H100 Supply Remains Tight, Lead Time Extends to 52 Weeks
daily.excerpt_zh: 英伟达H100 GPU交货周期从36周进一步延长至52周，云厂商正在加速导入自研芯片和AMD MI300系列作为替代方案。
daily.excerpt_en: Nvidia H100 GPU lead time extends from 36 to 52 weeks. Cloud providers are accelerating adoption of in-house chips and AMD MI300 series as alternatives.

daily.title_zh: AI编程助手Cursor月活突破500万，企业版营收占比超60%
daily.title_en: AI Coding Assistant Cursor Hits 5M MAU, Enterprise Revenue Exceeds 60%
daily.excerpt_zh: AI编程工具Cursor宣布月活跃用户突破500万，其中企业版订阅收入占总营收60%以上。公司同时宣布B轮融资2亿美元，估值达15亿美元。
daily.excerpt_en: AI coding tool Cursor announces 5M monthly active users, with enterprise subscriptions accounting for over 60% of total revenue. Company also announces $200M Series B at $1.5B valuation.
